full_text:
Dong Heng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Heng. Objected to Pang De as leader for battle against Guan Yu. Dong Heng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Dong Heng lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
